# function: convert_location_to_short_format

Given a full Azure region name, returns the corresponding short location code.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Converts full region name to short location code
output "location_short" {
  value = provider::dx::convert_location_to_short_format("italynorth")
}
```

## Signature

<!-- signature generated by tfplugindocs -->

```text
convert_location_to_short_format(location_long string) string
```

## Arguments

<!-- arguments generated by tfplugindocs -->

1. `location_long` (String) Full Azure region name (e.g., "italynorth", "westeurope", "northeurope", "swedencentral", "spaincentral", "germanycentral").

## Return

(String) Short location code (e.g., "itn", "weu", "neu", "swc", "spc", "gwc").

## Supported Locations

| Full name        | Short code |
| :--------------- | :--------: |
| `italynorth`     |   `itn`    |
| `westeurope`     |   `weu`    |
| `northeurope`    |   `neu`    |
| `swedencentral`  |   `swc`    |
| `spaincentral`   |   `spc`    |
| `germanycentral` |   `gwc`    |
